agency_name: New Jersey Department of Health / New Jersey Department of Environmental Protection
repeat_testing_guidance: New Jersey private well owners should use PWTA timing, local conditions, and NJDOH or NJDEP guidance rather than a single Sharp v1 retest cadence. The route should keep certified-lab collection and follow-up context visible.
benchmark_notes: New Jersey has state PFAS drinking-water standards and PWTA-related private well context, but private wells remain owner-managed. Outputs should stay reference-based and should not be framed as household compliance findings.
